channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: NFT bull Steve Aoki sells his SHIB, ETH, and PEPE. His Bored Apes are down 88%.
item.description: The DJ who told CoinDesk in 2021 that NFTs would be "part of culture" within five years is quietly exiting crypto.

item.title: Nikita Bier says crypto has had a rough year, hints at building something new as X Money launch nears
item.description: The head of product's viral one-liner lands weeks before Elon Musk's fiat payments app goes live with a 6% yield and a Visa card

item.title: Justice Department opens compensation for victims of $4B OneCoin crypto fraud
item.description: OneCoin was launched by Ruja Ignatova and Karl Sebastian Greenwood in Bulgaria. Ignatova has been missing since 2017, and Greenwood was sentenced to 20 years in prison.

item.title: Little-known token ranks alongside bitcoin and ether in the top three — just not in the way you think
item.description: RAVE has surged several thousand percent in seven days, driving frenzied trading activity and large liquidations, second only to industry leaders bitcoin and ether.

item.title: Japan's central bank cools rate hike expectations, removing a key risk for bitcoin's rally
item.description: The BOJ's dovish shift keeps the yen carry trade alive, the same trade whose unwind crashed bitcoin 24% in two days in August 2024.

item.title: Bitcoin bears eye $50K bottom as analysts claim final flush still to come
item.description: Bitcoin falling to the $50,000 level is being seen as the “last significant accumulation zone” before any sustained recovery, says LVRG Research director Nick Ruck.

item.title: Dogecoin climbs 3% toward 10 cents as ether breakout drives memecoin bets
item.description: Strong institutional activity pushed DOGE out of consolidation, but the real test sits just above current levels.

item.title: XRP climbs 3% to $1.37 as accumulation builds, but key breakout still ahead
item.description: Strong volume and rising demand contrast with deeply bearish sentiment, setting up a potential move if $1.42 clears.

item.title: Banks challenge White House report on stablecoin yields
item.description: The American Bankers Association is concerned that stablecoin yields would lead to mass deposit outflows from smaller community banks.

item.title: Bearish bets lose $430 million as BTC, ETH surge as much as 7%
item.description: The six-week range that capped every rally at $73,000 finally broke on Monday as stocks erased all Iran war losses and Trump signaled willingness to resume peace talks.

item.title: Ether outpaces bitcoin as ETF flows split and Ethereum activity jumps 41% on-week
item.description: Ether is outperforming bitcoin as ETF flows, spot prices and a 41% jump in Ethereum transactions move in the same direction for the first time in months.

item.title: Crypto has had a rough year. Maybe we should launch something to fix it. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFA0UFd0Zmh5LWdaYWJDMnlEbmVId1VBQjZmSkEybTR2NkhmSVlMZlBSSjFUWGFKZkxPeVltTzQtTm9TV29DTjJHOUl5WEFRNWgzdTdvdFJpbkRmOWVtSEQ2Wg?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto has had a rough year. Maybe w…

item.title: Former CFTC chair Giancarlo leaves law to focus on crypto advisory
item.description: Chris Giancarlo, who oversaw the first Bitcoin futures ETF approval as CFTC chairman, will now advise fintech and digital asset founders and boards.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $75K as Iran deal hopes spark $400M short squeeze
item.description: A broad hope for a US deal with Iran to end weeks of conflict has spurred investor confidence in riskier assets.

item.title: South Korea fines Coinone $3.5M, orders partial business suspension: Reports
item.description: Coinone is the second to face South Korea’s crackdown on exchanges in the last month, following a $24 million fine and a six-month partial suspension order against Bithumb.

item.title: U.S. lawmakers take another swing at crypto tax policy with revised bill
item.description: A bill would amend how the IRS would approach crypto taxes.

item.title: Foundry launches Zcash mining pool, notches 29% hashrate in first month
item.description: The launch of Foundry Zcash Pool has cut ViaBTC’s mining pool hashrate dominance from around 65% to 37%.

item.title: Ether holders back in profit as ETH price aims for rally to $3K
item.description: Large Ether investors are back in profit, increasing the chances of a rally toward $3,000, but resistance at $2,800 may delay the recovery.

item.title: JUST IN: $175,000,000 worth of shorts liquidated from the crypto market in the past 60 minutes. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE91LVJUZHpiRnNoVmZLZUJmVXZXYzNaQ3VDLUFWbW1rSERqZEpQYng5WkhyRHFfTlp4M2pVQm81SGJLWFB1RHpQU29CZ09rTVp4Q29weE94MHJNUVBqY3BiSEFB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $175,000,000 worth of sho…

item.title: Bitcoin breaks out above the post-October high resistance. Retest of $90K next - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBMRWZmbUc4VXJqVE5rTGZpYkNPVW94VWhqakFiVmVNNU9HVF9lZzc4TVV2cDhUWVE3NU1NQkZRZ3lKQm5ZQnNuQzdCQnV3MkV6NkplQ1R0T2s4YkZUTTZB?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin breaks out above the post-Octo…

item.title: Bitcoin reclaims $74K as spot ETF demand clashes with BTC miner sell pressure
item.description: Bitcoin rallied above $74,000 after the Monday stock market close, but derivatives data show that some traders remain bearish.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin jumped +$4,000 in the past 12 hours and hit a high of $74,500, while ETH surged +7.50%, hitting $2,340. Over $300,000,000 in crypto shorts were liquidated during this move. Over $100 BILLION has been added to the crypto market today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE53SzZxcVZCcnNFc1FBZExBXzV3ZVQ0RTJUemJMLTNfVzBMZVptVUhEODNpWEdYTHVFa1Jrb1BiTnBPNGtIUHpUNjAxVjRKQ2toMG1WUEVIY09jb1lUQWFuWWxWOA?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin jumped +$4,000…

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin extends gains to +5% on the day and rises above $74,000. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE52Zi1NdGxrNi11VVB1MllrcVdlaE5VYktDUlVzYnJ1eFNSQVRZbFA4OFd1SlNOb2pVQUhPVWktWFpjanc1MG1GMVR0REpndjdSMElqNDVHREF6NG1jamVHOWdJcURwdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin extends ga…

item.title: Broadridge rolls out crypto, tokenized asset platform for Canada wealth managers
item.description: The technology services provider said wealth managers have faced challenges integrating digital assets without relying on separate systems.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto.com Reveals $1 Million in CRO Fighter Bonuses for White House UFC Fight
item.description: The crypto exchange will distribute a record $1 million Cronos (CRO) fighter bonus pool at the upcoming UFC fight at the White House.

item.title: SEC proposes certain crypto interfaces don’t need to register as brokers
item.description: Hester Peirce, who heads the SEC’s crypto task force, said that the staff statement represented “expansive readings of the securities laws“ in response to digital assets.

item.title: Japan's Tech Titans Just Teamed Up to Build a Trillion-Parameter AI—And It's Not Here to Chat
item.description: SoftBank, Sony, Honda, and NEC have formed a new company to build physical AI for robots and machines, backed by $6.7 billion in government funding.

item.title: 'Dramatic Change': Starknet Creator Reveals Layoffs Amid Revenue-Focused Pivot
item.description: StarkWare co-founder and CEO Eli Ben-Sasson said the firm building on Ethereum slashed its headcount in a move to prioritize revenue.

item.title: MiniMax Drops State-of-the-Art AI Agent Model—Then Quietly Changes the License
item.description: MiniMax M2.7 rivals Claude Opus on key coding benchmarks, but the Chinese AI lab updated commercial terms shortly after releasing the weights on Hugging Face.

item.title: Bitmine ramps up Ether buys, pushes holdings toward 5% of total supply
item.description: While others refrain from boosting their Ether holdings, Bitmine's latest purchase gives it ownership of about 4% of total supply as the company expands its staking strategy.

item.title: This little-known token just posted a 6,000% rally — and traders are trying to figure out why
item.description: RAVE’s sudden surge into crypto’s top ranks has drawn intense attention, with a mix of unusual trading patterns, tight supply and market dynamics fueling debate over what’s really behind the move.

item.title: New Pro-DeFi Policies Show the SEC Isn't Waiting for Congress to Act on Crypto
item.description: The SEC released a new, permissive policy on DeFi interfaces Monday that was immediately celebrated by crypto industry leaders.

item.title: Price predictions 4/13: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin and altcoin charts highlight growing strength across the industry. Will geopolitics and US economic health concerns stand in the way of the rally?

item.title: Bitcoin erases weekend decline, returns to $73,400 as oil retreats back under $100
item.description: Risk assets shrugged off the failed weekend negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, and the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Kraken rejects extortion attempt tied to client data exposure
item.description: The exchange’s head of security said there had been two incidents involving “inappropriate access” to client data, involving about 2,000 user accounts.

item.title: Coinbase VP of international policy leaves for OpenAI
item.description: Tom Duff Gordon exited to join OpenAI as head of EMEA Policy, a spokesperson for Coinbase said.

item.title: Bitcoin OG Adam Back: Denies Being Satoshi Nakamoto On April 10, 2026, in an interview with Bloomberg Podcasts, Bitcoin OG Adam Back @adam3us denied speculations that he is Satoshi Nakamoto. He stated that current discussions lack new evidence. T - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5UNFliVVRzYUsxU2RjdXBjemxuWWdIcnVlSVBZWmhIdjNkZ2dINkN4dll4Vm55SGVka2tTTUpodGdkTXpsMnR4ZlFNLUJQLVl5OXlpT0xMRU1JWXpIdHNXa0FtSQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin OG Adam Back: Denies Bei…

item.title: Crypto wallet firm Exodus sues W3C and its CEO Garth Howat, seeking to compel $175M acquisition
item.description: A lawsuit in the Delaware Court of Chancery seeks to compel Howat to comply with obligations under the November 24, 2025 Stock Purchase Agreement.

item.title: Bitcoin's struggle to build long-lasting uptrend continues: Here’s why
item.description: Bitcoin’s attempts to hold rallies above the $70,000 to $75,000 range continue as ETF demand limps along, US Treasury yields rise and traders take profit as BTC price hits overhead resistance.

item.title: White House crypto adviser Witt says other Clarity Act hurdles being cleared
item.description: Patrick Witt told CoinDesk that a recent compromise on stablecoin yield should hold as the Senate tries to advance its crypto bill, even as bankers continue warnings.

item.title: Dormant Bitcoin wallets are the biggest quantum risk: Here is why
item.description: Not all Bitcoin faces the same level of risk from quantum computing. Dormant wallets with exposed public keys could be the first targets.

item.title: Polymarket Trader Turns $500 Into $252K After UFC Makes Yet Another Scoring Error
item.description: A Polymarket trader walked away with $252,000 in profits after taking advantage of the UFC’s latest “scoring error.”

item.title: 'We Will Not Pay These Criminals': Crypto Exchange Kraken Is Being Extorted Over Stolen Data
item.description: Crypto exchange Kraken says it's being extorted over stolen customer data, but won't yield to the criminals or negotiate.

item.title: Bitcoin shorts above $70K at risk since ‘90% of downside’ is already complete
item.description: Bitcoin price data suggests BTC remains undervalued and that short positions opened above $70,000 face a high risk of liquidation.

item.title: Anthropic Claude Mythos: Serious Threat or Overhyped? AI Security Institute Weighs In
item.description: Claude Mythos could be a potentially massive cybersecurity threat, according to early testing from the UK’s AI Safety Institute.

item.title: Forget the Dead-Eyed Cartoon—Meta Is Building a Photorealistic AI Clone of Zuckerberg
item.description: Three years after his Horizon Worlds avatar became a global meme, Zuckerberg is back at the avatar game, this time with a realistic AI clone.

item.title: Jito, KODA team up on institutional staking in South Korea
item.description: The collaboration aims to bring regulated custody and staking for JitoSOL to South Korea as institutions prepare for new crypto rules.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC staff outlines conditions for crypto trading apps and wallets to avoid broker-dealer registration. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9oSGd4aWx6RUctZTBRbnRVVkQ3b3ZKSVhmX3VnRVp3aHF5aGdUenNFVVMwaFd3WDJVLV9nVTRib09OSzdTaEhSdGx2dlZYX1dPRTZ0eHVRejlab2RnM1J0eHBR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC staff outlines c…

item.title: U.S. SEC says software allowing crypto wallet transactions not considered broker
item.description: The latest crypto view from the securities agency concludes software that clears the way for securities transactions with individual wallets won't trip regulations.

item.title: Crypto-aligned super PAC begins to endorse candidates for US midterms
item.description: The Fellowship PAC reported spending $300,000 on advertising for a Republican running to represent Georgia's 14th Congressional District in 2026.

item.title: Surging Bitcoin, Ethereum ETF Investments Drive Crypto Funds to Best Week Since January
item.description: Institutional crypto investors posted their strongest weekly inflows since January, with Bitcoin and Ethereum demand rising as XRP investments cool.

item.title: Justin Sun Bashes Trump Family's World Liberty, Claims Investors Used as 'Personal ATM'
item.description: Tron founder Justin Sun, a major investor in the Trump-backed World Liberty Financial, lashed out at the company over the weekend.

item.title: Crypto Hacker Mints $1.1 Billion in Polkadot via Ethereum Bridge, But Can Only Cash Out $237K
item.description: A hacker exploited a Polkadot bridge, minting $1.1 billion worth of DOT tokens before making a tiny fraction of that tally by selling it.

item.title: From privacy breakthroughs to AI agents and institutional rails, the Ethereum ecosystem keeps shipping. Here are 22 things the ecosystem delivered over the past few weeks. 0/ @gnosis_ and partners introduced The Ethereum Economic Zone ( @etheconomi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5oVDNnbHQyM1ZGenNHV0k1cmlfaDY0Rnc0WW5yazY0NkhfVUZaRE1EQU85RDRKWkJEUVU1M2VPdlBXNTFYZ21Hd3BvWE9fTHFlN3M0YzhfUXdEdUlDR0E?oc=5" target="_blank">From privacy breakthroughs to AI agents…

item.title: Crypto exchange Kraken targeted in extortion attempt but says there was no breach and no client funds at risk
item.description: The firm said a criminal group is attempting to extort it over limited insider-related data access incidents affecting about 2,000 accounts. Kraken says it will not pay and is working with law enforcement.

item.title: I think when we removed the crypto bots, there were only 2000 people rugging each other back and forth, forever - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBVcE5ic1BhTUpPMm16YTVQMzZiSFJwMi1uYlhGb3dsVkY4STFtd25yRTAxM3hCb1g3N01NSXpRQnotUlU3MmJVc3NjbWU0ajh3TW5IZG1RMVhQS2hDRk85Yg?oc=5" target="_blank">I think when we removed the crypto b…

item.title: Circle CEO says he won’t freeze USDC without a court order even as hackers walk away with millions
item.description: Circle defends its hands-off approach to freezing funds as critics point to hundreds of millions in losses tied to delayed action.

item.title: Bankers rebuff White House claim that stablecoin yield doesn't threaten deposits
item.description: A new study from the American Bankers Association says the White House economists went after the wrong premise in their recent look at the issue.

item.title: Foundry Launches Zcash Mining Pool Alongside Industry-Leading Bitcoin Pool
item.description: The world's largest Bitcoin mining pool operator expands into the privacy-focused Zcash token with rapid network adoption.
